# format: html5-dompatch-v2
# status: active

Batch index=0 size=16
CreateDocument key=1 doctype=<none>
CreateElement key=2 ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=1 child=2
CreateElement key=3 ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=2 child=3
CreateElement key=4 ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=2 child=4
CreateElement key=5 ns=html local="template" attrs=[]
CreateTemplateContents host=5 contents=6
AppendChild parent=4 child=5
CreateText key=7 text="before"
AppendChild parent=6 child=7
CreateProcessingInstruction key=8 target="template" data="data"
AppendChild parent=6 child=8
CreateText key=9 text="after"
AppendChild parent=6 child=9
